Body.Content:
With Agent Builder inside Microsoft 365 Copilot, users can now use Office skills like generating PowerPoint decks, Excel spreadsheets, and Word documents by chatting with the agent. This helps users save time by completing commonly used tasks. These Office skills will come as a part of the "Generate documents, charts, and code" capability in Agent Builder (formerly known as Code Interpreter).

GA date: November CY2025
